title: Recurring Automation - Duplicating group with generic due dates
excerpt: We have recurring tasks every month, quarter and year that fall on the same day of the month.  I would be nice to have a date column that is not a specific date, but more generic so that when the group is duplicated, the…

posts.author: jmcpherson (Jen McPherson)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have recurring tasks every month, quarter and year that fall on the same day of the month. I would be nice to have a date column that is not a specific date, but more generic so that when the group is duplicated, the dates don’t have to be manually reset for each task every time.
Example:

  • task due every month on the 10th
  • task due every year on March 15
  • task due every quarter on 15 days after end of quarter

posts.author: Hezibo (Hezi Bosmi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jmcpherson
I’m not sure that I fully understand you needs but I’m writing you some suggestions that might help you.
You can set an automation to create the item in the requested date. Like that:

image946×566 31.2 KB

Then, you may set another automation that once the item is created so set the day for today:

Does it help you?

posts.author: jmcpherson (Jen McPherson)
posts.cookedHtml: No. I need to be able to select a calendar date WITHOUT a year. That way when I duplicate the item every month or year or quarter, I don’t have to go in and manually change all the due dates.

posts.author: prattpratt (Christopher Pratt)
posts.cookedHtml: I also have this same request. Our firm absolutely needs an “Every year on [month] [day] duplicate an item / create an item”. Without this feature it’s a lot of legwork at the beginning of each year to get the recurring tasks set up.

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @prattpratt ,

We have created the app Recurring Tasks Schedule Pro - monday.com App Marketplace, which allows you to setup recurring tasks on item and subitem level in few simple clicks. It has various advanced features like

  1. Highly customizable recurrence
  2. Ability to set status, due date, target group on schedule run
  3. Calendar view (to visualize your upcoming tasks on calendar)
  4. Weekday based schedules (2nd Thursday of month, etc)
  5. Custom date based name
  6. Notifications to task assignee

Screenshot 2024-08-12 at 3.16.42 PM1448×1686 252 KB

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml: This should perfectly fit your use case
